name: Kalamazoo Boards & Commissions API
description: Public JSON API for City of Kalamazoo advisory boards and commissions
note: Static JSON files auto-updated by GitHub Actions. No authentication. Full CORS access.
ai_note: Do not scrape HTML pages — JavaScript-rendered. Use these JSON endpoints for all queries.

meetings.description: All upcoming meetings across every board — date, time, location, abbr, isCancelled

boards.description: All boards with full member rosters — abbr, name, members[], termEnd, isVacant

vacancies.description: Boards ranked by open seat count — abbr, vacantSeats, totalSeats

changelog.description: Build metadata + per-board meeting and upcoming counts

board_data.description: Historical records per board — minutes PDFs, agenda links, YouTube recordings

common_queries.next_meeting: GET /api/meetings.json → filter abbr === 'CPSRAB' and date >= today → first result
common_queries.historical_recording: GET /data/cpsrab.json → filter meetings by date → youtube_url or youtube_id
common_queries.week_meetings: GET /api/meetings.json → filter date within next 7 days
